common.chooseUsernameDesc: Pick a unique username for your ClanTrader profile. This will be visible to other users and used for mentions.
common.usernameHint: 3-30 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only. Must start with a letter.
common.inviteFriendDesc: Share your personal invite link with friends. When they sign up, they'll be linked to your account.

auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your username or email to continue
auth.signUpSubtitle: Join the competitive social trading platform
auth.name: Name
auth.eaLoginHint: Click "Login" in your MetaTrader EA. If your browser didn't open, paste the token below.
auth.tokenFailed: Login failed. Token may be invalid or expired.
auth.quickLoginFailed: Quick login failed — run npm run db:seed first
auth.mtConnectHint: Connect via MetaTrader EA to become a Verified Trader instantly.
auth.haveRegToken: Have a registration token from the EA?
auth.regTokenFailed: Registration failed. Token may be invalid or expired.
auth.eaDisclaimer: The ClanTrader EA connects to your MetaTrader to verify trading activity. It reads trade history and account balance — it never places or modifies trades.
auth.joinCta: Form clans, share trade signals, compete on leaderboards, and prove your edge.
auth.canConnectMtLater: You can connect MetaTrader after signup to become a Verified Trader.
auth.addEmailDesc: Add an email and password as a secondary login method.
auth.eaTokenExpired: Token expired or invalid. Please try again from MetaTrader.
auth.verifyEmailPending: We sent a verification link to your email. Please check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.
auth.verifyEmailSuccess: Your email has been verified! You can now sign in.
auth.resendVerificationSent: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
auth.resendVerificationFailed: Failed to resend. Please try again.
auth.resendVerificationRateLimit: Please wait before requesting another email.

chat.noChatsDesc: Join a clan to start chatting with other traders.
chat.noChannelsDesc: Follow a clan to see their announcements and trade signals.

chat.noPostsDesc: This clan hasn't published any channel posts yet.

chat.deletePostConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this post? This action cannot be undone.
chat.premiumLocked: Premium content — join clan or upgrade to view
chat.slRemoved: Stop Loss was removed — trade is unprotected
chat.conversationStart: This is the beginning of your conversation with {name}.
chat.messagesPrivate: Messages are private between you two.
chat.createTopicDesc: Create a new chat topic for your clan.
chat.summarySaved: Summary saved as message in chat

trade.setBeDesc: Move stop loss to entry price
trade.addNoteDesc: Add a note to this trade
trade.closeWarning: This will close the trade in MetaTrader. The action is irreversible.
trade.mtUpdateWarning: This will update your MetaTrader trade. The change will be applied on the next EA heartbeat.
trade.noteChatOnly: Notes don't affect MetaTrader — they are chat-only.
trade.notFoundDesc: This trade may have been removed or is unavailable.
trade.mtSyncDesc: This trade is linked to MetaTrader. Actions (Set BE, Move SL, Change TP, Close) will be executed via the EA.
trade.analysisDisclaimer: Analysis trades are not included in official statistics

clan.clanNameHint: Your clan's public identity. Choose wisely.
clan.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell others what your clan is about...
clan.focusHint: Helps traders find clans that match their style.
clan.publicHint: Your clan will appear in discovery and search.
clan.privateHint: Members will need an invite link to join.
clan.whatNextDesc: You'll be the clan owner. You can invite members, create channels, and start sharing trade signals.
clan.noClan: You're not in a clan yet.
clan.noActiveInvites: No active invites. Create one to share with others.
clan.avatarHint: Click the camera icon to change the clan avatar
clan.joinRequestsEnabledLabel: Join requests enabled — users can request to join
clan.confirmLeave: Are you sure you want to leave this clan?
clan.confirmRemoveMember: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
clan.confirmLeaveSoloLeader: You are the only member. Leaving will permanently dissolve this clan. Continue?
clan.confirmTransferLeadership: Transfer leadership of this clan to {name}?
clan.switchClanSoloLeaderDesc: You are the only member of {current}. Switching will permanently dissolve it.
clan.switchClanLeaderDesc: You must transfer leadership of {current} before you can switch.
clan.deleteClanWarning: Deleting this clan is permanent. All members will be removed and all data will be lost.
clan.confirmDeleteClan: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this clan? This cannot be undone.

missions.allComplete: All missions complete! You're all set.
missions.exploreDesc: Browse top traders, check their statements, and find clans worth following.
missions.followDesc: Follow a clan to see their posts and signals in your feed.
missions.joinClanDesc: Join a team of traders to compete in seasons and leaderboards, or create your own.
missions.metatraderDesc: Link your MT account to send verified trade signals automatically to your clan.
missions.postDesc: Share signals, tutorials, or news in your clan channel for others to follow.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Let's get you set up in under 2 minutes.

admin.noActivityYet: No activity yet. Actions like toggling feature flags, generating demo data, and managing clans will appear here.
admin.keyHint: Lowercase with hyphens. Cannot be changed after creation.
admin.manualBadgeHint: Manual badges are awarded/revoked by admin action only.
admin.globalRecomputeDesc: Re-evaluates all badges for all users with trades. This may take a while.
admin.noUsersWouldGain: No users would gain this badge.
admin.noUsersWouldLose: No users would lose this badge.
admin.dryRunDesc: Preview the impact of changing badge requirements. No data is modified.
admin.noBadgesFound: No badges found. Create one to get started.
admin.manageClanVisibility: Manage clan visibility and featured status on the Discover page.
admin.featuredTip: Featured clans appear at the top of the Discover page with a special badge. Use this to promote high-quality or trusted clans.
admin.featureFlagsDesc: Turn platform features on or off globally.
admin.noFlagsConfigured: No feature flags configured. Run seed to create defaults.
admin.badgesDesc: Manage rank, performance, and trophy badges.
admin.paywallRulesDesc: Control what free users can see vs. what requires a Pro subscription. Each rule defines which fields are visible or hidden for free users.
admin.noRulesConfigured: No paywall rules configured. Run seed to create defaults.
admin.activityLogsDesc: Structured activity log for all system and admin events.
admin.noLogsFound: No logs found. Try adjusting your filters.
admin.subscriptionPlansDesc: Manage subscription tiers and their entitlements. Active plans are visible to users on the pricing page.
admin.noPlansConfigured: No plans configured. Run seed to create defaults.
admin.rankingConfigDesc: Configure how the composite leaderboard score is calculated. Each weight controls how much a particular metric contributes to the final ranking. Weights should add up to 1.0.
admin.demoDataDesc: Generate realistic test data for development and demos. This creates fake clans with members, trade signals, and optionally computes all downstream data (statements, rankings).
admin.kanbanDesc: Track features across all project phases.
admin.kanbanResultPlaceholder: What was the outcome of this task?
admin.kanbanDashboardNoToday: No tasks scheduled for today — pick from suggestions below.
admin.kanbanRebalanceNoChanges: Everything looks balanced — no changes needed
admin.pmDesc: PM roadmap with evidence-based status tracking
admin.pmTimelineNoEstimates: No estimates set for this phase
admin.alphaDesc: Track user-reported issues during alpha testing
admin.digestsEmpty: No digests yet. Send your first one!

banner.addEmail: Add an email to secure your account and enable password recovery.

guide.title: How Signal Cards Work
guide.subtitle: Signal cards are created automatically from your MetaTrader trades.
guide.step1Desc: Link your MT4/MT5 account in settings.
guide.step2Desc: Download and install the EA on your chart.
guide.step3Desc: Open positions normally. The EA syncs everything.
guide.step4Desc: Cards are posted in clan chat when you open trades. SL/TP changes sync in real-time.

geoNews.title: Geo Live News
geoNews.subtitle: Live geopolitical events that may impact financial markets
geoNews.disclaimer: Maps provided by Liveuamap. Links open in a new tab. ClanTrader is not affiliated with Liveuamap.

download.title: Download ClanTrader EA
download.subtitle: Install the Expert Advisor on your MetaTrader platform to connect your trading account, sync trades, and verify signals automatically.
download.mt4Desc: For MT4 terminals. Download the source file and place it in your Experts folder. MetaTrader will compile it automatically.
download.mt5Desc: For MT5 terminals. Download the source file and place it in your Experts folder. MetaTrader will compile it automatically.
download.step1Desc: Download the correct version for your platform (MT4 or MT5).
download.step2Desc: Open MetaTrader → File → Open Data Folder → MQL4/Experts (or MQL5/Experts). Copy the downloaded .mq4/.mq5 file there. MetaTrader will compile it automatically when you restart or refresh.
download.step3Desc: Tools → Options → Expert Advisors → Check "Allow WebRequest for listed URL" → Add
download.step4Desc: In the same Options panel, check "Allow DLL imports".
download.step5Desc: In the Navigator panel, find ClanTrader_EA under Expert Advisors. Drag it onto any chart. Enter your username and password, then click Login or Register.

myClans.title: My Clans
myClans.noClansDesc: Create your own clan or join one from the discover page.
myClans.createNewClanDesc: Form a team of traders and compete together in seasons.

landing.heroDescription: Connect your MetaTrader account, form a clan with verified traders, and compete in monthly seasons. Your real trades. Your real edge.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: From MetaTrader to the leaderboard in four steps
landing.stepInstallEaDesc: Download the ClanTrader Expert Advisor for MT4 or MT5. One-click install.
landing.stepConnectDesc: The EA links your MetaTrader account to ClanTrader. Your trades are verified automatically.
landing.stepJoinDesc: Team up with 3-6 verified traders. Share strategies, compete as a unit.
landing.stepCompeteDesc: Monthly seasons with real rankings. Return, risk management, and consistency all count.
landing.ctaDescription: Connect your MetaTrader account, join a clan, and start competing today.
landing.tagline: ClanTrader — Trade Together. Compete. Prove It.

integrity.cardTypeAnalysis: Analysis cards are not eligible for statements

statement.effectiveRankDesc: Open gains don't improve rank. Open losses reduce rank until closed.

statement.provisional: Provisional — tracking stale with open trades
